title: Redis rate limiter fails open on error
recommended_fix: Add circuit breaker pattern; deny requests when rate limit backend is unavailable; consider fallback to local rate limiting

title: Weak default NATS auth token in compose file
recommended_fix: Remove default fallback; require NATS_AUTH_TOKEN to be set explicitly in all environments; validate token strength at startup

title: In-memory rate limiting doesn't protect distributed deployments
recommended_fix: Deploy with Redis-backed rate limiting in multi-instance production environments; document this in deployment guide

title: Password generation falls back to math/rand on crypto/rand failure
recommended_fix: Panic or fail securely instead of falling back to non-cryptographic RNG; crypto/rand failure indicates system entropy exhaustion which should halt operations

title: SSO token passed via URL query parameter for WebUI access
recommended_fix: Document security considerations; use short token expiry (5 minutes recommended); accept trade-off for simplicity

title: Missing unit tests for admin API handlers
recommended_fix: Add unit tests for input validation, error handling, and response format
